case_title: CATHY J SABLE VS. DEBRA L WIELAND

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO DEFENDANT WIELAND, DEBRA L HEARING SET FOR SEP-01-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF EXEMPTION PACKET FOR SEPT-19-2011 HEARING FROM SHERIFF RECEIVED & FILED.
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED **UNSERVED** - DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE - UNABLE TO LOCATE
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OF DEFENDANT FILED BY DEFENDANT WIELAND, DEBRA L
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-25-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-25-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DEC-22-2011 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-26-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN 506. DEFENDANT IS MAKING MONTHLY PAYMENTS. ALL TERMS OF THE PAYMENT PLAN REMAIN THE SAME. DEFENDANT TO NOTIFY COURT WHEN SHE WILL HAVE A CHANGE IN WORK STATUS. DEFENDANT IS TO COMPLETE UPDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENT FORM AND STATEMENT OF ASSETS FORM AND MAIL THE FORMS TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF MAY-10-2012 IS CONTINUED PER THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF(JC) TO OCT-25-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AMENDED (SC-222) ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SABLE, CATHY J

THE HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF JAN-30-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED ON JAN 28, 2014. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2011 - JUDGMENT.

SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED *(PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEBRA WIELAND)*
COPYING FEES (9 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SABLE, CATHY J

SUBPOENA ISSUED TO DEBRA L. WIELAND
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED

" RESPONSE" (SC-221) TO REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SABLE, CATHY J
ORDER (SC-222) ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENT. THE REQUEST IS "APPROVED", AND THE COURT ORDERS: PAYMENTS OF $200, ON THE 20TH DAY OF EACH MONTH, STARTING DATE: NOV-20-2012.

THE HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF OCT-25-2012 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-27-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN 506. "JUDGMENT CREDITOR IS GOING TO FILE AN AMENDED SC-222 REFLECTING ALL THE TERMS OF THE INSTALLMENT PAYMENT PLAN FOR THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER ON AMENDED (SC-222) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS "APPROVED", AND THE COURTS: PAYMENTS OF $200, ON THE 20TH DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING NOV-20-2012, AND INTEREST AT THE LEGAL RATE OF 10% ON OUTSTANDING BALANCE. - PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL

THE HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF SEP-26-2013 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-30-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF SAID DEFENDANT IS MAKING PAYMENTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,110.00 FILED BY SABLE, CATHY J AS TO DEFENDANT WIELAND, DEBRA L ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SABLE, CATHY J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WIELAND, DEBRA L $6,110.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,250.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SONOMA COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SABLE, CATHY J AS TO DEFENDANT WIELAND, DEBRA L
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO DEBRA WIELAND

THE HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF SEP-01-2011 IS CONTINUED TO DEC-22-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN 506 FOR PARTIES TO REVIEW DEFENDANT'S EMPLOYMENT. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $100.00 PER MONTH STARTING ON SEPTEMBER 20, 2011. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE DIRECTLY TO PLAINTIFF'S ACCOUNT. PLAINTIFF IS TO RETAIN $500.00 FROM $1766.36 IN LEVIED FUNDS OF DEFENDANT, THE BALANCE IS TO BE RELEASED TO DEFENDANT. ANNUAL INTEREST ON JUDGMENT IS 5 PERCENT. PLAINTIFF RETURNS ALL UNCASHED CHECKS OF DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL.
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO DEBRA L. WIELAND
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SONOMA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $488.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WIELAND, DEBRA L
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO DEBRA L. WIELAND
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WIELAND, DEBRA L
SC-104 PROOF OF SERVICE RE: SUBPOENA FILED BY PLAINTIFF SABLE, CATHY J
DECLARATION OF THE DEFENDANT'S RE: (SC-220) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS (INSTALLMENT) RECEIVED VIA EXPRESS MAIL FILED. FILED BY DEFENDANT WIELAND, DEBRA L

DEFENDANT MUST BRING THE COMPLETED SC-133 FORM TO THE NEXT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
